title: Discipline Committee | MBA IB DSE
description:
The Discipline Committee is the body that looks after the decorum of the institute and makes sure that everyone is groomed in the best possible manner and as per industry standards.
DSE MBA IB | University of Delhi | MIB | Since 1995
paragraphs: Discipline Committee serves as a moderator to ensure proper decorum during various corporate lectures and events organized by various other committees. The committee assures that proper dress code and behavior conduct is maintained during corporate interactions.

Student BodyPublic Relations CommitteeCorporate Relations TeamAlumni Relations CommitteeTeam ConventionIISACDiscipline CommitteeConstrat CellMarcom CellFinance CellInternational Business CellSports ClubTraining and Development ClubInfinty Club
Student CornerPR Coverage FormTime Table | Batch of 2023-24Programme BrochureNewsletters
Chhatra Marg, Delhi School Of Economics, University Enclave, Delhi-110007
For any complaints against any constituent member of the MBA IB Student Body, Kindly reach out to PRESIDENT@MIBDU.ORG
